title: Schools block funding formulae 2025 to 2026
body: "Schools block funding formulae 2025 to 2026  This document provides an overview of the funding formula factor values chosen by local authorities as of 17 March 2025. It provides charts and commentary on the ranges of unit funding attributed under each of the permitted factors.  Local authority proforma data 2025 to 2026  This spreadsheet contains data taken from the 2025 to 2026 Authority Proforma Tool (APT) detailing funding formula information for each local authority. "
